home.badge: 🌱 Free forever · No credit card required · 7 live platforms · 15+ AI tools
home.headline: Social media management
home.subheadline: Schedule to 7 social platforms, write better content with 15+ AI tools, and track what's working — all free. Pro from $5/month.
home.no_card: No card required · Free forever · Setup in 60 seconds
home.built_by_desc: Bootstrapped. No VC. No $99/month trap. Just a builder who needed better tools and built them for everyone.

free_tier.headline: Most tools charge for this. We don't.
free_tier.subheadline: SocialMate's free plan is designed to be genuinely useful — not a crippled demo. Here's exactly what you get at $0/month, forever.

platforms.headline: 5 social platforms live. Twitch & YouTube clips built in.
platforms.subheadline: Bluesky, Discord, Telegram, Mastodon, and X/Twitter live now. TikTok coming very soon. Twitch clips and YouTube videos schedulable directly inside SocialMate. LinkedIn, Reddit, and more on the roadmap.

clips.headline: From clip to scheduled post. No extra tabs.
clips.subheadline: Browse your Twitch clips or YouTube videos directly inside SocialMate and schedule them to 5 platforms in one click. No downloading. No app-switching. No copy-pasting URLs into five different tabs.
clips.twitch_desc: Connect your Twitch account and your top clips appear in a thumbnail grid — view counts, duration, everything. Hit Schedule and you're done.
clips.youtube_desc: Paste your channel URL — that's it. No API key, no approval process, no developer account. Your latest public videos load instantly and are ready to schedule.
clips.search_desc: You don't even need to own the channel. Search any Twitch streamer's top clips and schedule them directly — perfect for clippers and fan accounts.
clips.cta_note: Free on all plans · Twitch OAuth · YouTube via channel URL

ai_tools.headline: 12 AI tools built in
ai_tools.subheadline: Every tool runs on Google Gemini. 50 credits included free every month — no separate AI subscription, no hidden costs. Credits exist to keep the service sustainable for everyone.

features.headline: Everything you need to grow
features.subheadline: Every feature that matters. Most of them free.

items.scheduling_desc: Schedule across 5 social platforms, with Twitch and YouTube clips support built in. Bulk upload, automated queues, and platform-specific character limit enforcement included.
items.ai_desc: Generate captions, hashtags, viral hooks, full threads, content calendars, and post scores — all powered by Google Gemini.
items.analytics_desc: Posting streaks, platform breakdown, best days and times, consistency scores, and engagement tracking. No inflated numbers.
items.bio_desc: A fully-featured bio link page built right in. Custom themes, button styles, social icons, and a public URL — free on every plan.
items.team_desc: Invite team members, assign roles, manage access, and run content approval workflows. Free plan includes 2 seats.
items.workspaces_desc: Pro includes 1 client workspace. Agency includes 10 — each fully isolated with their own accounts, posts, analytics, and team.
items.evergreen_desc: Mark your best posts as evergreen and they automatically re-queue when your schedule runs empty. Set it once.
items.rss_desc: Pull posts from any RSS or Atom feed and turn them into scheduled social posts in one click. Works with any blog or podcast.
items.competitor_desc: Track up to 3 competitor accounts on every plan including free. Know what they're posting before you do.

comparison.headline: What you've been paying for vs what you actually need
comparison.subheadline: Social media management tools removed their free plans, locked features behind enterprise tiers, and kept raising prices. SocialMate went the other direction.
comparison.cta_headline: Everything above. Free to start. $5/month to grow.
comparison.cta_sub1: No per-seat fees. No feature gating for basics. No removed free plan.
comparison.cta_sub2: Features marked "✅ Free" are always free. AI tools use credits — free users get 50/month to keep infrastructure sustainable.

bio_link.headline: Link in Bio — included free
bio_link.subheadline: Dedicated bio link tools charge $10–20/month for what SocialMate includes on every plan at no cost. Build your page, add your links, and share one URL everywhere.
bio_link.feature_domain: Custom domain — earn free via referrals, or included on Pro+

sustainability.headline: Free should mean free. Not a limited demo.
sustainability.subheadline: SocialMate keeps infrastructure sustainable through a credit system — so we can give every free user tools that actually work without burning out. AI generation is the only thing credits gate, and free users get 50 every month. Everything else — scheduling, analytics, link in bio, bulk upload — is free, always.
sustainability.no_ads: No ads in your feed. No data selling. Just clean tools that actually work — we suggest, never spam.
sustainability.free_tier_desc: Scheduling, bulk upload, analytics, link in bio, competitor tracking, 2 team seats, and 50 AI credits per month — all at $0. No hidden paywalls on the basics.
sustainability.credits_desc: AI generation uses real compute — we use credits to keep that sustainable, not as a lever to squeeze upgrades. The credit system lets the free tier thrive.
sustainability.no_bait_desc: Free means free. The free plan is not a trial, not a countdown, and not designed to frustrate you into upgrading. What you see is what you get.

guides.headline: Gilgamesh's Guides — the free playbooks
guides.subheadline: Real-talk guides on starting a business, marketing from zero, and building with AI. Written by the solo founder who built SocialMate between deli shifts. No courses to buy. No email required.
guides.vol1_desc: Wyoming LLC for $150, Reddit validation, free stack, first customers, and what nobody tells you about doing it alone.
guides.vol2_desc: Organic growth, content flywheels, community seeding, and how to turn every platform into a distribution channel.
guides.vol3_desc: DUNS numbers, PAYDEX scores, every tax deduction explained, LLC vs S-Corp, banking setup, and insurance. All free.
guides.vol4_desc: How to ship production software with no CS degree using AI as your co-pilot. The real workflow, the real mistakes.

story.headline: Professional tools shouldn't require a professional budget.
story.subheadline: SocialMate is fully bootstrapped — built solo, across every role, with no investors and no safety net. The belief driving it: creators and small businesses deserve tools that actually work at a price that doesn't require a business budget to justify. The platforms that charge $99/month know this. They just bet you won't look for a better option.

sm_give.headline: Every subscription supports something bigger.
sm_give.desc: 2% of every SocialMate subscription goes directly to SM-Give — funding school supply bookbags, baby essentials for struggling parents, and homeless care packages. No corporate partners. No sponsors. Just us.

final_cta.headline: Ready to get started?
final_cta.subheadline: Free forever. No card required. 50 AI credits per month, included free. Set up in 60 seconds.

home.cta_no_card: No card required · Free forever · Setup in 60 seconds

pricing.subheadline: Start free. Upgrade when you need to. No surprises.

pricing.plan_pro_desc: For creators and small businesses who want to grow faster.
pricing.plan_agency_desc: For agencies and power users managing multiple brands.
pricing.ai_credits_sub: Credits are shared across all AI tools. Every plan includes a monthly credit bank.
pricing.white_label_headline: Sell it as your own product
pricing.white_label_sub: Both tiers are monthly add-ons. No long-term contract required.
pricing.x_boosters_sub: One-time purchases. Credits stack and never expire.

signup.subheadline: Free forever. No credit card required.
signup.terms_agree: By signing up, you agree to our
signup.desktop_subheadline: Schedule to 7 live platforms, get 15+ AI tools, and grow your audience — completely free.

white_label_tab.upgrade_to_pro_hint_sub: Upgrade to White Label Pro for custom domain support and full rebrand at $40/mo.

app_ai_features.title: AI Features
app_ai_features.subtitle: All the tools available in your SocialMate account
app_ai_features.tools_ready: 9 AI tools ready — including SM-Pulse, SM-Radar & Content Gap
app_ai_features.pro_required: Pro+ required for AI Image Generation and AI Content Calendar.
app_ai_features.why_credits: Why do AI tools cost credits?
app_ai_features.credits_explanation: Every AI generation calls Google Gemini, which has real compute costs. Credits keep SocialMate sustainable so we can stay free. Free plan includes 50 credits/month — enough to generate ~15 captions, ~25 hashtag sets, or run ~5 SM-Pulse scans. Unused credits roll into your bank (up to 75 max).

app_agents.title: Agents
app_agents.subtitle: Autonomous tools that work while you sleep. Each agent handles a specific job — from outreach to intel — so you can focus on creating.

app_soma_landing.title: SOMA Content Intelligence
app_soma_landing.hero_sub: SOMA watches what changed week over week in your master doc and turns the delta into a platform-native content calendar. No brainstorming. No blank page. Just your story, told everywhere.
app_soma_landing.modes_headline: You choose how much SOMA does
app_soma_landing.modes_sub: Start with Safe Mode on your Pro plan. Upgrade when you trust the agent.
app_soma_landing.platforms_sub: SOMA doesn't copy-paste the same post everywhere. It reformats your message natively for each platform — so it sounds right everywhere.
app_soma_landing.platform_live_desc: — SOMA generates and schedules automatically to your connected accounts.
app_soma_landing.platform_soon_desc: — SOMA generates the content anyway. Copy and post manually, or it queues automatically once the platform connects.
app_soma_landing.projects_sub: SOMA Projects let you run separate master doc pipelines per client — each with their own voice profile, platform settings, and content history.
app_soma_landing.pricing_headline: Start free with Pro. Scale when ready.
app_soma_landing.credits_sub: SOMA uses your SocialMate AI credits. Credits reset monthly on Pro and Agency plans — or buy one-time packs anytime.
app_soma_landing.credits_pro_covers: Pro plan (500 cr/mo) covers 5 full runs with 100 left over for other AI tools.
app_soma_landing.responsible_p1: SOMA is an automation tool — you are responsible for your content. Automated posting must comply with each platform's Terms of Service. Do not use SOMA to spam, harass, mislead, or post at volumes that could trigger platform rate limits or account restrictions.
app_soma_landing.responsible_p2: SOMA's daily and monthly caps are designed to keep your accounts healthy. Exceeding platform-recommended posting frequency — even within SOMA's limits — is at your own risk. SocialMate and Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC are not liable for account suspensions or restrictions resulting from your posting behavior.
app_soma_landing.responsible_fine: By enabling Autopilot or Full Send mode, you acknowledge that posts will go live automatically on your behalf and that you accept full responsibility for their content and timing.
app_soma_landing.built_by: Built by Joshua Bostic — Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC
app_soma_landing.built_by_sub: Solo founder. Bootstrapped. Building tools that give people the same marketing power that agencies charge thousands for — at prices that don't gatekeep.

app_soma_dashboard.title: SOMA
app_soma_dashboard.subtitle: Self-Optimizing Media Agent
app_soma_dashboard.voice_not_set_desc: SOMA needs to learn your voice before it can generate content that sounds like you.
app_soma_dashboard.no_ingestion_desc: Run an ingestion to give SOMA fresh material to work with.
app_soma_dashboard.queue_clear_sub: Run a weekly ingestion to generate new content.
app_soma_dashboard.projects_sub: Named pipelines — each with their own master doc and settings
app_soma_dashboard.no_projects_sub: Create a project to start your master doc pipeline.
app_soma_dashboard.quick_voice_dna_sub: 25–40 questions that shape your AI voice
app_soma_dashboard.choose_autonomous: Choose how autonomous you want SOMA to be.
app_soma_dashboard.already_autopilot: You have Autopilot. Go fully autonomous with Full Send.
app_soma_dashboard.safe_mode_note: Safe Mode (free) stays available. You can downgrade anytime from Settings.

app_soma_voice.title: Voice DNA Builder
app_soma_voice.subtitle: Answer questions about how you think, talk, and create. SOMA uses your answers to generate content that sounds like you — not a template.
app_soma_voice.existing_tier_note: You completed — retaking will update your Voice DNA
app_soma_voice.save_later: You can save and come back anytime
app_soma_voice.done_desc: SOMA has built your voice model. Every post generated from here on will be shaped by who you are, how you talk, and what you stand for.
app_soma_voice.done_feedback: After each content run, SOMA will ask 3 quick questions to keep learning and adapting to you over time.

app_enki_dashboard.title: Enki
app_enki_dashboard.subtitle: Treasury Guardian
app_enki_dashboard.no_notifications_sub: Trade alerts and guardian updates appear here.
app_enki_dashboard.copilot_banner: Viewing {email}'s account in Co-Pilot mode — read-only access
app_enki_dashboard.get_started_desc: Here's how to start paper trading in 2 minutes.
app_enki_dashboard.doctrine_desc: Doctrines are your trading strategies. A Balanced Doctrine has already been created for you — trading SPY, QQQ, and AAPL at 10% position size. Just activate it and the guardian starts watching.
app_enki_dashboard.go_to_doctrines: Go to Doctrines and arm one →
app_enki_dashboard.scan_desc: Enki scans the market every 15 minutes during market hours (Mon–Fri 9:30 AM–4:00 PM ET). Your first trade will appear here after the next scan finds a qualifying signal.
app_enki_dashboard.broker_connect_desc: Connect your broker in Settings to start trading. Your treasury data will appear here once the first scan cycle runs.
app_enki_dashboard.tier_activated: Your tier has been activated. Create a doctrine to put the guardian to work.
app_enki_dashboard.simulation_desc: Paper trading only. Upgrade to Commander to go live with real stocks.
app_enki_dashboard.no_trades_sub: The guardian is watching. Trades execute when confidence hits 6/10.

app_creator_hub.title: Creator Hub
app_creator_hub.subtitle: Monetize your audience with tip jars and fan subscriptions. Stripe handles payments — you keep everything (minus Stripe's ~2.9% + 30¢).
app_creator_hub.pro_gate_desc: Tip jars, fan subscriptions, and paywalled content — powered by Stripe. 0% platform cut. Available on Pro and Agency plans.
app_creator_hub.connect_stripe_desc: Required to receive payments. Takes ~2 minutes.
app_creator_hub.tip_jar_desc: One-time payments from fans who love your work
app_creator_hub.fan_subs_desc: Monthly recurring support from your community
app_creator_hub.exclusive_posts_desc: Paywalled content for fans and one-time buyers
app_creator_hub.unlock_price_label: One-time unlock price (optional — leave blank for sub-only)
app_creator_hub.unlock_price_note: If set, non-subscribers can also pay once to unlock this post.
app_creator_hub.no_exclusive_posts: No exclusive posts yet. Create your first one above.

app_creator_public.not_found_desc: This creator page doesn't exist or hasn't been set up yet.
app_creator_public.already_subscriber_desc: Enter the email you subscribed with to unlock exclusive content.

app_enki_landing.title: Enki Trading Bot
app_enki_landing.dev_banner: 🚧 Enki is in active development — join the waitlist for founding member pricing and early access.
app_enki_landing.hero_sub: Enki is the cold elite autonomous guardian of your treasury — executing disciplined stock and crypto doctrines with fortress-grade downside protection and relentless compounding. No finance degree required.
app_enki_landing.signals_sub: All seven must align before confidence crosses the execution threshold. Below 6/10 — the guardian waits.
app_enki_landing.threshold_buy: Minimum confidence to execute a BUY. 5/10 for SELL.
app_enki_landing.fortress_sub: Your capital is protected before it can grow. These rules run before every single order — no exceptions, no overrides on Citizen or Commander.
app_enki_landing.waitlist_sub: Join the waitlist and be among the first Architects to run paper trading when the beta opens. Founding member pricing locked in — no price increases for early access members.
app_enki_landing.waitlist_fine: No spam. No commitment. No credit card for Citizen.
app_enki_landing.risk_p1: Enki is a trading automation tool — not a financial advisor, broker, or investment service. Nothing on this page or within the Enki platform constitutes financial, investment, legal, or tax advice.
app_enki_landing.risk_p2: Trading in stocks, ETFs, and cryptocurrencies involves substantial risk of loss, including the possible loss of your entire principal. Past backtest or paper-trading performance does not guarantee future results. Markets are unpredictable and no algorithm can eliminate risk.
app_enki_landing.risk_p3: Enki's Fortress Guard and risk rules reduce exposure but cannot protect against all losses. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions. Only trade with money you can afford to lose entirely.
app_enki_landing.risk_fine: Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC does not provide investment advice. Use of Enki constitutes acceptance that you are acting as an independent investor making your own decisions. Consult a licensed financial professional before trading.
app_enki_landing.built_by: Built by Joshua Bostic — Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC
app_enki_landing.built_by_sub: Solo founder. Bootstrapped. The same person behind SocialMate and RenewalMate. Building the Gilgamesh Empire OS — tools for people who can't afford the expensive ones.

app_enki_truth.title: Truth Mode
app_enki_truth.rule_1: • No parameter changes while data is collecting — if you change anything, reset the dataset
app_enki_truth.rule_3: • Minimum 50 trades per strategy before drawing any conclusions
app_enki_truth.off_description: Truth Mode runs a simplified two-strategy trading system in parallel to validate real performance. Results are recorded separately and do not affect your main portfolio. Parameters lock once started to preserve data integrity.
app_enki_truth.off_scan_note: The scan runs every 15 minutes. Your Risk Profile and Position Size settings will be locked while Truth Mode is active.
app_enki_truth.stop_confirm: Stopping Truth Mode will reset your experiment. All recorded trades will be cleared and you will start fresh next time. Are you sure?
app_enki_truth.description: Two strategies only. No fusion, no magic numbers. Goal: determine whether any real edge exists before adding complexity. Conclusions require ≥50 trades per strategy.
app_enki_truth.empty_waiting_body: Truth Mode is running. The scanner checks for signals every 15 minutes during market hours.
app_enki_truth.warning_not_enough_data: Not enough data yet — results are not statistically meaningful
app_enki_truth.warning_conf_not_validated: {strategy}: Confidence scoring not yet validated — HIGH and MEDIUM win rates are similar

app_enki_trades.empty_scan_note: Enki scans every 15 minutes during market hours (9:30 AM–4:00 PM ET).
app_enki_trades.footer_scan_note: Enki scans every 15 min during market hours (Mon–Fri 9:30 AM–4:00 PM ET) · Paper trades only on Citizen tier

app_enki_doctrines.scan_protocol_body: Enki scans every 15 minutes during market hours (Mon–Fri, 9:30 AM–4:00 PM ET). Active doctrines run automatically — no action required once armed. Confidence threshold: 0.04% price movement. Max 5 active doctrines per account.
app_enki_doctrines.active_limit_warning: Maximum active doctrines reached (5/5). Deactivate one before enabling another.
app_enki_doctrines.empty_body: Doctrines are the rules Enki fights by. Define your symbols, risk tolerance, and broker — then arm it and let the Guardian execute.
app_enki_doctrines.broker_alpaca_sublabel_stocks_only: Stocks only — switch asset class to use Alpaca
app_enki_doctrines.broker_coinbase_sublabel_crypto_only: Crypto only — switch asset class to use Coinbase
app_enki_doctrines.symbols_hint: Press Enter or comma to add. Backspace removes last.
app_enki_doctrines.toggle_trailing_stop_sub: Stop-loss follows price upward as it rises
app_enki_doctrines.toggle_activate_sublabel_normal: Guardian picks this up on the next 15-min scan
app_enki_doctrines.delete_modal_body: This will permanently remove the doctrine and cannot be undone. The Guardian will stop scanning for it immediately.
app_enki_doctrines.toast_max_active: You already have 5 active doctrines (the max)

app_settings_scheduling_tab.title: ⏰ Scheduling Window
app_settings_scheduling_tab.desc: Posts auto-scheduled via Smart Queue will only land within this window. Times are in your local timezone.
app_settings_scheduling_tab.dnd_desc: Mute all app notifications during these hours

app_soma_weekly.title: ⚡ This Week's Ingestion
app_soma_weekly.subtitle: Tell SOMA what happened this week. She'll turn it into 21 posts.
app_soma_weekly.topics_ph: e.g. Launched new feature, hit 100 users, posted every day...
app_soma_weekly.goals_ph: e.g. Onboard first paying customer, ship v2...
app_soma_weekly.done_sub: Spread across 7 days · morning, afternoon, evening slots
app_soma_weekly.upload_desc: Upload a .txt or .md file with your weekly notes
app_soma_weekly.err_fill_one: Please fill in at least one field.
app_soma_weekly.err_insufficient_credits: Not enough SOMA credits. You need 25 credits to analyze a week.
app_soma_weekly.err_generic: Failed to analyze. Please try again.
app_soma_weekly.err_select_file: Please select a file to upload.
app_soma_weekly.err_select_platform: Please select at least one platform.
app_soma_weekly.err_insufficient_credits_gen: Not enough SOMA credits. You need 75 credits to generate a week.
app_soma_weekly.err_gen_failed: Failed to generate posts. Please try again.

app_soma_upgrade.title: SOMA is a Pro feature
app_soma_upgrade.subtitle: Self-Optimizing Media Agent is available on Pro and Agency plans. Upgrade to unlock AI-powered weekly content generation, identity profiling, and autopilot scheduling.
app_soma_upgrade.feature_voice: Voice identity profile — SOMA learns your tone
app_soma_upgrade.feature_ingest: Weekly content ingestion — themes, hooks, ideas
app_soma_upgrade.feature_schedule: Smart scheduling — posts at your best times
app_soma_upgrade.feature_autopilot: Autopilot mode — fully automated on Pro+ (add-on)
